caption: A man with a short beard wearing a green t-shirt, a green baseball cap, and black headphones sits in a studio setting, speaking into a black microphone. His t-shirt features white text that reads "ION NEVER DO SHIT". The background is a cluttered room featuring several framed photographs on a blue wall, a white mannequin wearing a white long-sleeved shirt and grey pants, and clothing racks with various garments. Logos are visible in the lower corners of the screen, including one on the left that reads "SIT DOWN" and one on the right that reads "BOSSY FLEX 101". Across the sequence, the man's facial expressions shift as he speaks, with his mouth opening and closing and his gaze moving slightly. The camera remains stationary, focusing on his upper body as he engages in a conversation.
